measurements.claim: The twenty-third-wave packet expands only Reddit, YouTube, Hacker News, dev.to, and technical blog outreach across quant/algotrading, robotics/materials, and MCP/agent security.
evidence: TWENTY-THIRD-WAVE-QUANT-SECURITY-SOCIAL-BLOG-COMMENT-EXPANSION-2026-07-02.md purpose lists Reddit, YouTube, Hacker News, dev.to, and technical blog targets
the purpose says the wave covers quant/algotrading, robotics/materials, and MCP/agent-security communities
the purpose says the wave avoids funding and new GitHub work

measurements.claim: The packet includes exact, non-identical comment drafts for 8 Reddit targets, 9 YouTube targets, and 8 social/blog targets with URLs and reasons.
evidence: Reddit targets R33-R40 include URL, reason, and text
YouTube targets Y36-Y44 include URL, reason, and text
Blog/social targets B23-B30 include URL, reason, and text
drafts vary by target and do not duplicate the same comment

measurements.claim: The packet explicitly marks public posting as not completed and requires action-time confirmation before representational communication is posted.
evidence: Posting rule says no public comment should be claimed as posted until the public side effect actually completes
Posting rule says representational communication still needs action-time confirmation of exact destination and exact text
Posting Confirmation Template requires destinations and exact text

measurements.claim: The twenty-third wave contains no Project Telos repository link in target-specific comment text and recommends an initial no-link first run.
evidence: The packet purpose says it does not include project-link comments
Recommended Next Run says start with 8 no-link comments

measurements.claim: The packet keeps quant/trading comments framed as validation and engineering workflow rather than investment advice.
evidence: Current Social Posture says keep quant/trading comments framed as engineering validation, not investment advice
R33-R38 and Y36-Y39 discuss receipts, validation, backtests, paper trading, slippage, OOS splits, reproducibility, and audit trails
No quant/trading draft recommends buying, selling, allocating capital, or expecting a specific return
